channel.title: easy-baking-posts Posts - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh easy-baking-posts posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: Fresh and Easy Easter Desserts to Wow Your Holiday Table
item.description: These Easter desserts bring spring flavors to your table with minimal fuss. Featuring fresh berries and light textures, they're perfect for celebrating with family and friends. Quick to make, yet impressive to serve!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 8

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups fresh strawberries, hulled and sliced
  • 1 cup fresh blueberries
  • 1 cup heavy cream, cold
  • 1/4 cup powdered sugar
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 1 package store-bought puff pastry sheets, thawed
  • 1 egg, beaten (for egg wash)
  • Zest of 1 lemon
  • 2 tablespoons granulated sugar

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230294638 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #fresh #heavy

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fresh and Easy Easter Desserts to Wow Your Holiday Table
media:content.media:description: These Easter desserts bring spring flavors to your table with minimal fuss. Featuring fresh berries and light textures, they're perfect for celebrating with family and friends. Quick to make, yet impressive to serve!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230294638, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, fresh, heavy

item.title: Easy Easter Desserts That Bring Festive Joy Without Fuss
item.description: These Easter desserts are my go-to when time’s tight but I still want something festive and tasty. Simple ingredients, no stress, and perfect for any family gathering or last-minute celebration.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups all-purpose flour, sifted
  • 1 cup granulated sugar
  • 1/2 cup unsalted butter, softened
  • 2 large eggs
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 1/2 cup milk
  • 1 teaspoon baking powder
  • 1/4 teaspoon salt
  • 1 cup powdered sugar
  • 2 tablespoons lemon juice
  • Assorted pastel sprinkles or edible decorations

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230294638 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #allpurpose #granulated #unsalted

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easy Easter Desserts That Bring Festive Joy Without Fuss
media:content.media:description: These Easter desserts are my go-to when time’s tight but I still want something festive and tasty. Simple ingredients, no stress, and perfect for any family gathering or last-minute celebration.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230294638, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, allpurpose, granulated, unsalted

item.title: Classic Italian Easter Cookies with a Hint of Anise Flavor
item.description: These Italian Easter cookies are light, subtly sweet, and flavored with anise, making them a perfect spring treat. Simple to make and great for sharing during family gatherings or festive brunches!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 24

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 1/4 cups all-purpose flour, sifted
  • 1 cup granulated sugar
  • 1/2 cup unsalted butter, softened
  • 2 large eggs
  • 1 tablespoon anise seeds, lightly crushed
  • 1 teaspoon baking powder
  • 1/4 teaspoon salt
  • Powdered sugar for dusting

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230294638 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #allpurpose #granulated #unsalted

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Classic Italian Easter Cookies with a Hint of Anise Flavor
media:content.media:description: These Italian Easter cookies are light, subtly sweet, and flavored with anise, making them a perfect spring treat. Simple to make and great for sharing during family gatherings or festive brunches!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230294638, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, allpurpose, granulated, unsalted

item.title: Soft Italian Easter Cookies with a Hint of Anise and Citrus Zest
item.description: These Italian Easter cookies are delightfully soft with a bright citrus zing and a subtle anise flavor. Topped with cheerful sprinkles, they’re a festive treat to share at any spring gathering.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 24

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 3 cups all-purpose flour, sifted
  • 1 cup granulated sugar
  • 1/2 cup unsalted butter, softened
  • 2 large eggs
  • 1/4 cup fresh lemon juice
  • 1 tablespoon lemon zest
  • 1 teaspoon anise extract
  • 1 teaspoon baking powder
  • 1/4 teaspoon salt
  • 1/2 cup whole milk
  • Colorful sprinkles for topping

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230294638 #Mediumpost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #allpurpose #granulated #unsalted

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

media:content.media:description: These Italian Easter cookies are delightfully soft with a bright citrus zing and a subtle anise flavor. Topped with cheerful sprinkles, they’re a festive treat to share at any spring gathering.

item.title: Classic Italian Easter Cookies with a Subtle Anise Twist
item.description: These soft Italian Easter cookies are a springtime favorite, lightly sweet with a lovely hint of anise. They bake up golden and tender, perfect for family brunches or sharing with friends on holiday mornings.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 24

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 3 cups all-purpose flour, sifted
  • 1 cup granulated sugar
  • 1/2 cup unsalted butter, softened
  • 2 large eggs
  • 1 teaspoon anise extract
  • 1 teaspoon baking powder
  • 1/4 teaspoon salt
  • 1/4 cup milk
  • Powdered sugar for dusting (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

item.title: Soft Italian Easter Cookies Bursting with Citrus and Anise Flavors
item.description: These soft Italian Easter cookies are tender, zesty, and lightly spiced with anise. Perfect for spring brunches or family gatherings, they bring a fragrant, joyful touch to any table. Super easy to whip up!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 24

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 3 cups all-purpose flour, sifted
  • 1 cup granulated sugar
  • 1/2 cup unsalted butter, softened
  • 3 large eggs
  • 1/4 cup whole milk
  • 1 tablespoon lemon zest, finely grated
  • 1 teaspoon anise extract
  • 2 teaspoons baking powder
  • 1/4 teaspoon salt
  • Powdered sugar, for dusting

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230294638 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #allpurpose #granulated #unsalted

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

media:content.media:title: Soft Italian Easter Cookies Bursting with Citrus and Anise Flavors
media:content.media:description: These soft Italian Easter cookies are tender, zesty, and lightly spiced with anise. Perfect for spring brunches or family gatherings, they bring a fragrant, joyful touch to any table. Super easy to whip up!

item.title: Classic Italian Easter Almond Cookies with a Subtle Anise Twist
item.description: These soft Italian Easter cookies are gently sweet with a lovely almond flavor and a hint of anise. The light glaze adds the perfect finishing touch. Great for holiday celebrations or anytime you crave a nostalgic treat!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 24

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups almond flour, finely ground
  • 1 cup granulated sugar
  • 2 large egg whites, room temperature
  • 1 teaspoon almond extract
  • 1/2 teaspoon anise extract
  • 1/4 teaspoon salt
  • 1 cup powdered sugar
  • 2 tablespoons milk

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230294638 #Mediumpost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #almond #granulated #large

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Classic Italian Easter Almond Cookies with a Subtle Anise Twist
media:content.media:description: These soft Italian Easter cookies are gently sweet with a lovely almond flavor and a hint of anise. The light glaze adds the perfect finishing touch. Great for holiday celebrations or anytime you crave a nostalgic treat!

item.title: Easy No-Bake Easter Sweets Perfect for Busy Parents
item.description: These no-bake Easter sweets are a total lifesaver when you're short on time but still want to impress. Made with simple pantry staples and zero oven time, they’re perfect for last-minute holiday treats or a fun family activity.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup crushed graham crackers, finely ground
  • 1/2 cup creamy peanut butter, room temperature
  • 1/4 cup honey or maple syrup
  • 1 cup mini marshmallows
  • 1/2 cup white chocolate chips
  • Colored sprinkles or pastel candy melts for decoration

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230294638 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #crushed #creamy #honey

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easy No-Bake Easter Sweets Perfect for Busy Parents
media:content.media:description: These no-bake Easter sweets are a total lifesaver when you're short on time but still want to impress. Made with simple pantry staples and zero oven time, they’re perfect for last-minute holiday treats or a fun family activity.

item.title: Sweet-Tart Rhubarb and Strawberry Crisp with Oat Topping
item.description: This rhubarb and strawberry crisp is a perfect blend of tart and sweet with a cozy oat crumble on top. It comes together quickly, making it a go-to dessert for busy weekends or surprise guests.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 cups rhubarb, chopped, fresh
  • 3 cups strawberries, hulled and halved
  • 1 cup granulated sugar
  • 1/2 cup brown sugar, packed
  • 1 tablespoon lemon juice, fresh
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 1 cup rolled oats
  • 3/4 cup all-purpose flour
  • 1/2 cup unsalted butter, cold and cubed
  • 1/2 teaspoon ground cinnamon
  • 1/4 teaspoon salt

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230294638 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #rhubarb #strawberries #granulated

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Sweet-Tart Rhubarb and Strawberry Crisp with Oat Topping
media:content.media:description: This rhubarb and strawberry crisp is a perfect blend of tart and sweet with a cozy oat crumble on top. It comes together quickly, making it a go-to dessert for busy weekends or surprise guests.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230294638, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, rhubarb, strawberries, granulated

item.title: Strawberry Rhubarb Crisp with a Crunchy Oat Topping You’ll Love
item.description: This strawberry rhubarb crisp is a cozy springtime dessert with the perfect balance of tart and sweet. The oat topping caramelizes beautifully with brown sugar, making it great for weekend dinners or casual get-togethers.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 cups fresh strawberries, hulled and halved
  • 3 cups rhubarb stalks, chopped into 1/2-inch pieces
  • 1 cup granulated sugar
  • 1/2 cup brown sugar, packed
  • 1 tablespoon lemon juice
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 1 cup old-fashioned oats
  • 3/4 cup all-purpose flour
  • 1/2 cup unsalted butter, cold and cubed
  • 1/4 teaspoon salt
  • 1/2 teaspoon ground cinnamon

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230294638 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #fresh #rhubarb #granulated

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Strawberry Rhubarb Crisp with a Crunchy Oat Topping You’ll Love
media:content.media:description: This strawberry rhubarb crisp is a cozy springtime dessert with the perfect balance of tart and sweet. The oat topping caramelizes beautifully with brown sugar, making it great for weekend dinners or casual get-togethers.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230294638, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, fresh, rhubarb, granulated

item.title: Zesty Lemon Poppy Seed Cake with Buttermilk Moistness for Springtime Treats
item.description: This lemon poppy seed cake is my go-to for spring. The fresh lemon zest brightens every bite, while buttermilk keeps it super moist. It’s perfect for afternoon tea or a light dessert after dinner.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 8

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 1/2 cups all-purpose flour, sifted
  • 1 teaspoon baking powder
  • 1/2 teaspoon baking soda
  • 1/4 teaspoon salt
  • 1 cup granulated sugar
  • 2 large eggs, room temperature
  • 1/2 cup unsalted butter, melted and cooled
  • 1/2 cup buttermilk, room temperature
  • Zest of 2 medium lemons
  • 2 tablespoons fresh lemon juice
  • 2 tablespoons poppy seeds

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230294638 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #allpurpose #teaspoon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Zesty Lemon Poppy Seed Cake with Buttermilk Moistness for Springtime Treats
media:content.media:description: This lemon poppy seed cake is my go-to for spring. The fresh lemon zest brightens every bite, while buttermilk keeps it super moist. It’s perfect for afternoon tea or a light dessert after dinner.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230294638, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, allpurpose, teaspoon

item.title: Silky Mango Flan Cake with Caramel Drizzle for Tropical Dessert Lovers
item.description: This mango flan cake is a dreamy combo of creamy custard and fresh mango slices with a caramel base. Baking it in a water bath gives it that perfect silky texture. Chill it for a cool tropical treat anytime!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 50 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 8

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup granulated sugar (for caramel)
  • 4 large eggs
  • 1 (14 oz) can sweetened condensed milk
  • 1 (12 oz) can evaporated milk
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 2 ripe mangoes, peeled and thinly sliced
  • 1 cup whole milk

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230294638 #Mediumpost #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #granulated #large #sweetened

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Silky Mango Flan Cake with Caramel Drizzle for Tropical Dessert Lovers
media:content.media:description: This mango flan cake is a dreamy combo of creamy custard and fresh mango slices with a caramel base. Baking it in a water bath gives it that perfect silky texture. Chill it for a cool tropical treat anytime!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230294638, Mediumpost, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, granulated, large, sweetened
